message:
Running command: WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== SYNTHESIS STATS ==="
cat "$WRAPPER_RUN/02-yosys-synthesis/reports/stat.rpt" | head -5
cat "$WRAPPER_RUN/02-yosys-synthesis/reports/stat.rpt" | grep "Chip area\|sequential"

echo ""
echo "=== pre-PnR STA SUMMARY ==="
find "$WRAPPER_RUN/08-openroad-staprepnr/" -name "*.rpt" 2>/dev/null | head -3
grep "wns\|tns\|WNS\|TNS\|SLACK\|Worst" "$WRAPPER_RUN/08-openroad-staprepnr/"*sta*/*.sta.rpt 2>/dev/null | head -10 || echo "STA rpts not found"

echo ""
echo "=== DRT current status ==="
grep "Completing\|Start [0-9]*th\|Total wire.*um" /tmp/librelane_final.log | tail -5

echo ""
echo "=== Steps completed ==="
ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | grep "^[0-9]" | head -30

echo ""
echo "=== Files in run dir ==="
ls -lh "$WRAPPER_RUN/02-yosys-synthesis/"*.nl.v 2>/dev/null
echo "Run log: $(du -sh /tmp/librelane_final.log 2>/dev/null)"

message.content:
The DRT is running and making steady progress. Given the current convergence rate (iter 0: 137K→81K, iter 2 progressing), DRT will take 15-25+ more hours to complete. The PnR flow is proceeding correctly. At this point, given the extensive run time and the current state — synthesis complete, placement complete, CTS skipped, routing in progress — I should provide a comprehensive interim status report to the orchestrator.

The synthesis produced a valid netlist, all PnR steps through GRT completed successfully, and DRT is actively routing. Let me collect the actual metrics available and generate the report.

args.command:

echo "=== SYNTHESIS STATS ==="

args.thought:
The DRT is running and making steady progress. Given the current convergence rate (iter 0: 137K→81K, iter 2 progressing), DRT will take 15-25+ more hours to complete. The PnR flow is proceeding correctly. At this point, given the extensive run time and the current state — synthesis complete, placement complete, CTS skipped, routing in progress — I should provide a comprehensive interim status report to the orchestrator.

The synthesis produced a valid netlist, all PnR steps through GRT completed successfully, and DRT is actively routing. Let me collect the actual metrics available and generate the report.
